user.title: Home Energy Advisor
user.description: Choose the household energy inputs. Solar and battery are optional — without them, cost is calculated from grid import alone.

data_description.price_entity: The sensor giving the current import price per kWh.
data_description.currency: Currency for the cost sensors, e.g. EUR.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Cumulative energy imported from the grid.
data_description.solar_entity: Cumulative solar generation. Leave empty if you have no solar.
data_description.battery_charge_entity: Cumulative energy charged into the battery.
data_description.battery_discharge_entity: Cumulative energy discharged from the battery.
data_description.house_consumption_entity: Total household consumption, if measured directly.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Home Energy Advisor is already configured; only one instance is needed.
